T0180.title: Full Identity Dossier
T0180.definition: High-resolution photos or scans of the front and back of a citizen's ID card, containing core identity information like name, address, and ID number.
T0180.description: A black market term for acquired high-resolution images of both sides of an ID card, with complete and valid information. These materials are often used to bypass real-name verification, register illegal accounts, or forge documents, making them a core commodity for identity fraud crimes.
T0180.usageExample: "National 'priest' available, valid expiry dates, 6 USDT each. Online all day, send as many as you have."
